summary: UI refresh smoke test PASSED. Login (NEXUS.PANEL brand), Dashboard (meters + stats), Projects, Wizard, Project Detail (Deploy Logs tab with terminal-style LogViewer + live ws-status-dot), Settings (superadmin + sa@bprbangunarta.co.id + change-password) all render correctly. Zero React runtime errors, zero console errors, zero pageerrors across all pages after the UI refresh. JetBrains Mono font, refined dark palette, active accent bar sidebar, and terminal chrome (traffic lights, LIVE indicator) all visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Wizard step 3 (Domain & SSL) requires a domain to enable Next — expected but wizard-next-btn is disabled without visual hint text; consider inline helper.
seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing 'TEST UI App' project from prior iteration; deleted it via delete-action-btn -> confirm-delete-btn flow. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI refresh (JetBrains Mono, dark palette, StatusBadge ping dot, terminal LogViewer, sidebar accent bar, framer-motion fade-in, login glow) is stable. All key data-testids verified: meter-cpu/memory/disk, stat-projects/running/stopped/errors, nav-projects/settings, new-project-btn, wizard-name/repo/branch-input, wizard-next-btn/create-btn, project-card-{slug}, tab-config/logs/container, deploy-log-viewer, ws-status-dot, delete-action-btn, confirm-delete-btn, change-password-btn, login-username/password/submit-btn. Deploy ends 'Docker not available on this host' — expected in sandbox.
